candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Also a direct match, likely alternate label across periods.
Broader than cash equivalents because it includes short-term investments.
Broader than pure cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash-equivalents labels over broader cash-plus-short-term-investments labels.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total.
Only a component of current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean short-term debt component excluding lease wording.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Broad current debt total, but appears to include capitalized leases based on nearby breakdown.
Could capture current maturities, but appears sparse and may not be the main reported balance-sheet line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Needed to capture current portion of long-term debt while explicitly excluding leases.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Did not use 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because the disclosed components indicate it includes capitalized leases. Selected the minimal non-lease components instead; second label chosen outside shortlist confidently.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Includes non-current amounts and is therefore broader than taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No candidate shortlist was provided; selected the explicit short-term taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Net PPE but narrower than total PPE.
Gross PPE, less preferred than net total.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE as instructed.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of assets.
Only a component of assets.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.
Section/header style label, not the reported net cash flow amount.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow line rather than an intermediate subtotal.
